title: cyperus breviculmis
intro: Cyperus breviculmis, also known as the East Indian sedge or short-stemmed umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus breviculmis include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever, sore throats, and skin infections. In traditional herbal preparations, Cyperus breviculmis is often made into a decoction or powder, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies to enhance their effectiveness.
